item.title: Dozens of cocaine packages seized in Pacific, 11 rescued from shipwreck
item.description: The Mexican navy helped rescue shipwrecked sailors and retrieve bales of illicit drugs that had been dumped into the ocean.

item.title: Trump says war to end quickly as Iran claims control of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: As President Trump again voices optimism that Iran will "make a deal" to end the war, Tehran declares itself the regulator of Strait of Hormuz shipping.

item.title: Blanche on fears of citizenships being revoked, Trump retribution allegations
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche spoke to CBS News' Camilo Montoya-Galvez about the fears among naturalized U.S. citizens and the accusations of retribution by the Justice Department on behalf of President Trump.

item.title: What's the minimum you're required to withdraw on a $1 million retirement account?
item.description: If you've saved $1 million for retirement, the IRS dictates how much you withdraw, whether you're ready or not.

item.title: Snack mixes recalled due to possible Salmonella contamination
item.description: Mexican street corn-inspired trail mix made by Illinois food company was sold at Target and other retailers, as well as online.

item.title: Spencer Pratt trades jabs at LA mayoral debate
item.description: Spencer Pratt, the former reality TV star who is running for Los Angeles mayor, joined a debate with current mayor Karen Bass and councilmember Nithya Raman on Wednesday. CBS News Los Angeles' Tom Wait reports.

item.title: Spoiler alert! Shocking "Survivor" double elimination
item.description: (Warning: Spoilers ahead!) "CBS Mornings" reveals details of the latest "Survivor 50" episode and elimination ceremony, which had another surprise for the castaways.

item.title: Hottest U.S. gas prices in years leave drivers feeling burned
item.description: Americans on tight budgets are getting hit especially hard by surging fuel costs, forcing some to make hard choices.

item.title: Harlan Coben talks about his involvement in adaptation of his book "I Will Find You"
item.description: "CBS Mornings" has an exclusive preview of the new Netflix series "I Will Find You," which is based on Harlan Coben's 2023 novel. Coben, who is also an executive producer on the series, talks about what inspired the story and how closely he worked on the Netflix adaptation.

item.title: More people are starting and expanding small businesses, data shows
item.description: More Americans are starting and expanding small businesses, according to new data. CBS News' Jill Schlesinger has more. (Sponsored by AT&T Business)

item.title: Christy Turlington Burns says "it's a scary time" for maternal healthcare in U.S.
item.description: Christy Turlington Burns, the founder and president of the nonprofit "Every Mother Counts," speaks about her new documentary, which explores the state of maternal healthcare following the end of Roe v. Wade. She discusses the different risks for women and why this is personal for her.

item.title: AI skills are becoming vital for Americans seeking new jobs
item.description: More employers are seeking job candidates with AI skills. CBS MoneyWatch reporter Megan Cerullo has more details.

item.title: Breaking down controversial FDA decision to approve fruit-flavored e-cigarettes
item.description: The FDA has approved fruit-flavored e-cigarettes for adults for the first time, despite evidence showing they encourage younger people to smoke. CBS News medical correspondent Dr. Celine Gounder breaks down what to know about the controversial decision.

item.title: L.A. County spends millions to stop overdoses. Critics say naloxone enables addicts, but city data show scores of lives saved
item.description: CBS News California Investigates obtained data from the LAFD that show 24,503 of the 25,461 patients who received naloxone doses since 2022 survived their overdose, about 96%.

item.title: Rubio meeting with Pope Leo after tense exchanges between Trump and the first U.S.-born pontiff
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting with Pope Leo at the Vatican. It follows criticism by President Trump of Pope Leo and pushback by the first U.S.-born pontiff. Ramy Inocencio reports.

item.title: Food manufacturer Cento is committing "tomato fraud," lawsuit alleges
item.description: In a new lawsuit, two California residents allege that Cento Fine Foods doesn't use real San Marzano tomatoes in one of its products.

item.title: Airports grapple with gaps left behind by Spirit Airlines shutdown
item.description: Tim Kroll, the airport director of the Atlantic City International Airport, joins CBS News with more details on the response to Spirit Airlines shutting down.

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: May 7, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a house or refinance your existing one? These are the mortgage interest rates you'll need to know first.

item.title: Rubio and Pope Leo meet at the Vatican after weeks of tension
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio and Pope Leo XIV met Thursday at the Vatican to discuss the situation in the Middle East and other matters.

item.title: From 2018: Media mogul Ted Turner
item.description: Ted Turner, the media entrepreneur who owned TV and sports franchises, created CNN, and skippered yachts in the America's Cup, died on May 6, 2026 at age 87. In this Sept. 30, 2018 "Sunday Morning" profile, the outspoken Turner – known for his environmental advocacy as well as his politically incorrect views – talked with senior contributor Ted Koppel about how he fulfilled more ambitions than many people could ever dream of; and how, nearing 80, he faced a decline brought about by Lewy body dementia, a progressive brain disorder.

item.title: iPhone owners could get up to $95 from a new Apple settlement
item.description: A proposed $250 million settlement would compensate millions of consumers who bought the iPhone 16, iPhone 15 Pro or iPhone 15 Pro Max.

item.title: Trump promised cheaper drugs. Some prices dropped. Many others shot up.
item.description: Since his second term started, President Trump has introduced a flurry of initiatives aimed at taming the excesses of the pharmaceutical industry.

item.title: Blanche: Immigrants who committed fraud to become U.S. citizens should worry
item.description: The acting attorney general is touting the administration's stepped-up denaturalization efforts.

item.title: That discount at the pharmacy counter may pack hidden costs
item.description: The new TrumpRx program relies partly on connecting consumers with discount coupons offered by drugmakers. For insured patients, though, using a coupon can prove dicey.

item.title: Trump pardon recipients face congressional probe over "pay-to-play" questions
item.description: Congressional Democrats are investigating clemency recipients who may have obtained favorable treatment from Trump or his advisers "through intermediaries, financial contributions, or other forms of influence."

item.title: Kentucky Derby winner skipping Preakness Stakes, won't make Triple Crown run
item.description: The last time a horse won the Triple Crown was in 2018.

item.title: Indiana Senate to vote on 9-0 GOP congressional map, but future uncertain
item.description: The push to redistrict in Indiana has a crucial vote in the state's Senate on Thursday.

item.title: Highlights from Gavin Newsom's "Sunday Morning" interview: Proposition 50, opposing Trump, and 2028
item.description: California's Democratic governor talked with "CBS Sunday Morning" about redistricting, the "future of this republic," and his own plans for a presidential run.

item.title: Texas Democrats who fled the state over redistricting bill begin returning
item.description: Texas Democratic lawmakers who fled the state to deny a quorum are making their way back, each on their own timeline, multiple sources familiar with the matter told CBS News.

item.title: Former Atty. General Eric Holder talks with House Democrats about redistricting
item.description: Holder gave House Democrats an overview on the latest in the GOP Texas redistricting effort.
